result.stdout:
Usage: [command] [arguments...] [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Default command runs loom against loom.json run.target or BuildTarget.Build

Arguments:
  [0] <BuildTarget?>    Build target to run

Options:
  --rid <string?>                                                Override global rid set in loom.json
  --clean, Prepend Clean target to start of pipeline, --fresh    

Commands:
  init
